meaning: United Nations Conference on the Law of the Sea 联合国海洋法会议
examples: Therefore, the Philippines' unilateral initiation of arbitration has fallen short of meeting the UNCLOS conditions.
Third, by unilaterally initiating arbitration, the Philippines has abused the UNCLOS dispute settlement procedures.
Therefore, , the Philippines' unilateral initiation of arbitration has fallen short of meeting the UNCLOS conditions.
If China were to limit itself to claims based on UNCLOS, things would be clearer.
When two EEZs collide, UNCLOS calls for an equidistant line between the coasts, splitting the shared gulf or strait down the middle.
